newsitem.heading: Newsitem
newsitem.subHeading: A standard newsitem component consists of a heading, content, and optionally an image and date.

standing.heading: Standing
standing.subHeading: A single newsitem can be set to standing, which gives it a more prominent style and layout.
standing.text: The standing variant of the newsitem component.

stack.heading: Stack
stack.subHeading: Multiple newsitems can be stacked together to create a newsfeed.
stack.text: The stack variant of the newsitem component.
